description_long: This object is a potted sunflower with a single, tall, slender green stem rising from a round terracotta pot filled with dark soil. The flower head is circular and bright yellow, featuring a central disc and a ring of evenly spaced, pointed petals radiating outward. The pot has a classic conical shape with a slightly flared rim and a smooth, glossy finish. Two narrow, elongated green leaves emerge from the stem at different heights, each curving gently away from the main axis. The soil surface is flat and dark, contrasting with the warm, reddish-brown color of the pot. The overall appearance is stylized and simple, with clean lines and minimal textural detail.
description: A stylized sunflower with a tall green stem and two narrow leaves, growing from a round terracotta pot filled with dark soil. The flower head is bright yellow with pointed petals radiating from a central disc.
description_view_0: The sunflower is seen with one leaf curving left and the flower head facing slightly to the right, showing the pot's smooth surface and soil.
description_view_1: This view highlights the opposite side, with the second leaf visible and the flower head turned more towards the viewer.
description_view_2: The flower head is nearly in profile, and both leaves are partially visible, emphasizing the symmetry of the pot and stem.
description_view_3: The flower head faces forward, both leaves are visible, and the pot's round rim and soil are clearly seen.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, forming a single whorl around the central disc, with each petal evenly spaced and not overlapping.
